requirement_topic.en: Restricted Substances — No Horizontal RoHS-Equivalent in South Africa
requirement_topic.zh: 限用物质——南非无横向 RoHS 等效法规
requirement_topic.zht: 限用物質——南非無橫向 RoHS 等效法規

summary.en: As of 2026, South Africa does not have a horizontal RoHS-style law that restricts a fixed list of hazardous substances (such as lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, and phthalates) across all electrical and electronic equipment as a market-access condition, the way the EU RoHS Directive does. The NRCS Compulsory Specifications for lighting focus on electrical safety, performance and EMC via SANS/IEC standards rather than a substance-restriction regime. Some substance controls exist indirectly through general chemicals, occupational health, hazardous-substances and environmental legislation (e.g., the Hazardous Substances Act and environmental management law), and certain mercury controls flow from South Africa being a party to the Minamata Convention. However, there is no single mandatory RoHS-equivalent substance limit list that an LED luminaire must be tested against for South African market entry. Verify current law, as substance and e-waste regulation in South Africa is evolving.
summary.zh: 截至 2026 年，南非没有像欧盟 RoHS 指令那样、以市场准入条件形式对所有电气电子设备限制固定有害物质清单（如铅、汞、镉、六价铬及邻苯二甲酸酯）的横向 RoHS 式法律。NRCS 照明强制性规范侧重通过 SANS/IEC 标准管控电气安全、性能和 EMC，而非物质限制制度。部分物质管控通过一般化学品、职业卫生、危险物质及环境立法间接存在（如《危险物质法》和环境管理法），且因南非为《水俣公约》缔约方，部分汞管控由此而来。然而，并不存在单一的强制 RoHS 等效物质限值清单，要求 LED 灯具为进入南非市场而据以检测。请核查现行法律，因南非的物质和电子废弃物监管正在演进。
summary.zht: 截至 2026 年，南非沒有像歐盟 RoHS 指令那樣、以市場准入條件形式對所有電氣電子設備限制固定有害物質清單（如鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻及鄰苯二甲酸酯）的橫向 RoHS 式法律。NRCS 照明強制性規範側重通過 SANS/IEC 標準管控電氣安全、性能和 EMC，而非物質限制制度。部分物質管控通過一般化學品、職業衛生、危險物質及環境立法間接存在（如《危險物質法》和環境管理法），且因南非為《水俁公約》締約方，部分汞管控由此而來。然而，並不存在單一的強制 RoHS 等效物質限值清單，要求 LED 燈具為進入南非市場而據以檢測。請核查現行法律，因南非的物質和電子廢棄物監管正在演進。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal RoHS-equivalent substance-restriction law for EEE in South Africa as of 2026 (informational observation)
Hazardous Substances Act, 1973 (Act No. 15 of 1973) — general control of hazardous substances (not a RoHS-style EEE substance list)
Minamata Convention on Mercury — South Africa is a party (mercury-related controls)

summary.en: China operates a RoHS-style regime: GB/T 26572-2011 sets concentration limits for the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) in EEE, and China RoHS 2 (Management Measures, with marking standard SJ/T 11364) requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange/green) on EEE sold in China. China RoHS thus mandates substance disclosure and, for products on the conformity-assessment catalogue, control of the restricted substances. This is more structured than South Africa's position, which has no single equivalent substance-restriction list for EEE.
summary.zh: 中国实施 RoHS 式制度：GB/T 26572-2011 规定 EEE 中原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE）的浓度限值；中国 RoHS 2（管理办法，配套标识标准 SJ/T 11364）要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙色/绿色）。因此中国 RoHS 强制要求物质披露，并对列入合格评定目录的产品管控限用物质。这比南非的状况更具结构性——南非对 EEE 没有单一等效的物质限制清单。
summary.zht: 中國實施 RoHS 式制度：GB/T 26572-2011 規定 EEE 中原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE）的濃度限值；中國 RoHS 2（管理辦法，配套標識標準 SJ/T 11364）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙色/綠色）。因此中國 RoHS 強制要求物質披露，並對列入合格評定目錄的產品管控限用物質。這比南非的狀況更具結構性——南非對 EEE 沒有單一等效的物質限制清單。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (China, original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for restricted use of hazardous substances in EEE (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: This is a reverse gap: South Africa imposes no horizontal RoHS-style mandatory substance-restriction list for EEE market access, so a Chinese product already compliant with China RoHS (GB/T 26572) generally faces no additional mandatory substance-limit testing for South Africa on this basis alone. However, exporters should not assume zero obligation: (1) general chemicals, hazardous-substances and environmental law may still apply to specific substances (e.g., mercury under the Minamata Convention, relevant to certain lamp types); (2) customers, retailers or tender specifications may contractually require RoHS/REACH-type declarations even where not legally mandated; (3) the regulatory landscape (including e-waste EPR, see ledza-rohs-02) is evolving. Confirm current South African substance and environmental law and any buyer-imposed requirements before relying on the absence of a RoHS regime.
gap.zh: 这是一个反向差距：南非未对 EEE 市场准入施加横向 RoHS 式强制物质限制清单，因此已符合中国 RoHS（GB/T 26572）的中国产品，仅就此而言通常无须为南非进行额外的强制物质限值检测。但出口商不应假定零义务：（1）一般化学品、危险物质及环境法仍可能适用于特定物质（如《水俣公约》下的汞，与某些灯型相关）；（2）客户、零售商或招标规范可能在法律未强制时仍以合同方式要求 RoHS/REACH 式声明；（3）监管格局（包括电子废弃物 EPR，见 ledza-rohs-02）正在演进。在依赖南非无 RoHS 制度之前，请确认现行南非物质和环境法及任何买方施加的要求。
gap.zht: 這是一個反向差距：南非未對 EEE 市場准入施加橫向 RoHS 式強制物質限制清單，因此已符合中國 RoHS（GB/T 26572）的中國產品，僅就此而言通常無須為南非進行額外的強制物質限值檢測。但出口商不應假定零義務：（1）一般化學品、危險物質及環境法仍可能適用於特定物質（如《水俁公約》下的汞，與某些燈型相關）；（2）客戶、零售商或招標規範可能在法律未強制時仍以合同方式要求 RoHS/REACH 式聲明；（3）監管格局（包括電子廢棄物 EPR，見 ledza-rohs-02）正在演進。在依賴南非無 RoHS 制度之前，請確認現行南非物質和環境法及任何買方施加的要求。

mandatory_status.target: No horizontal RoHS-equivalent mandatory substance-restriction list for EEE in South Africa as of 2026; specific substances may be controlled under general chemicals/environmental law (e.g., mercury via the Minamata Convention) — verify current law and any buyer requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure / catalogue control) — China RoHS 2 disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances for in-scope products

source.publisher: Government of South Africa (gov.za) — Hazardous Substances Act and related legislation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Unlike the EU, South Africa has no horizontal RoHS-equivalent mandatory substance-restriction list for EEE as of 2026, so a China-RoHS-compliant LED product generally needs no additional mandatory substance-limit testing for South Africa on this basis alone. However, specific substances (e.g., mercury under the Minamata Convention) and general chemicals/environmental law may still apply, and buyers or tenders may contractually require substance declarations. Verify current South African law and customer requirements rather than assuming no obligation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与欧盟不同，截至 2026 年南非对 EEE 没有横向 RoHS 等效强制物质限制清单，因此符合中国 RoHS 的 LED 产品仅就此而言通常无须为南非进行额外的强制物质限值检测。但特定物质（如《水俣公约》下的汞）及一般化学品/环境法仍可能适用，买方或招标也可能以合同方式要求物质声明。请核查现行南非法律和客户要求，而非假定无义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與歐盟不同，截至 2026 年南非對 EEE 沒有橫向 RoHS 等效強制物質限制清單，因此符合中國 RoHS 的 LED 產品僅就此而言通常無須為南非進行額外的強制物質限值檢測。但特定物質（如《水俁公約》下的汞）及一般化學品/環境法仍可能適用，買方或招標也可能以合同方式要求物質聲明。請核查現行南非法律和客戶要求，而非假定無義務。

requirement_topic.zh: 电子废弃物/生产者延伸责任（EPR）登记
requirement_topic.zht: 電子廢棄物/生產者延伸責任（EPR）登記

summary.en: South Africa addresses end-of-life electrical and electronic equipment (including lighting/lamps) primarily through Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR). Under the National Environmental Management: Waste Act, 2008 (Act No. 59 of 2008) and the EPR Regulations (made effective from 2021), producers, importers and brand owners of identified products — including electrical and electronic equipment and lighting — must register with the Department of Forestry, Fisheries and the Environment (DFFE), join or establish a Producer Responsibility Organisation (PRO), pay EPR fees, and meet take-back/recycling obligations for end-of-life products and packaging. This is a producer/importer obligation tied to placing products on the South African market, not a product substance-content test. The South Africa-based importer typically carries the EPR registration. Verify the current EPR product list, fees and registration procedure.
summary.zh: 南非主要通过生产者延伸责任（EPR）处理报废电气电子设备（包括照明/灯）。依据《2008 年国家环境管理：废弃物法》（第 59 号法）及 EPR 法规（2021 年起生效），指定产品——包括电气电子设备和照明——的生产者、进口商和品牌所有者须向林业、渔业与环境部（DFFE）登记，加入或设立生产者责任组织（PRO），缴纳 EPR 费用，并就报废产品和包装履行回收/再生义务。这是与在南非市场投放产品相关的生产者/进口商义务，而非产品物质含量检测。南非本地进口商通常承担 EPR 登记。请核查现行 EPR 产品清单、费用和登记流程。
summary.zht: 南非主要通過生產者延伸責任（EPR）處理報廢電氣電子設備（包括照明/燈）。依據《2008 年國家環境管理：廢棄物法》（第 59 號法）及 EPR 法規（2021 年起生效），指定產品——包括電氣電子設備和照明——的生產者、進口商和品牌所有者須向林業、漁業與環境部（DFFE）登記，加入或設立生產者責任組織（PRO），繳納 EPR 費用，並就報廢產品和包裝履行回收/再生義務。這是與在南非市場投放產品相關的生產者/進口商義務，而非產品物質含量檢測。南非本地進口商通常承擔 EPR 登記。請核查現行 EPR 產品清單、費用和登記流程。

standards_or_laws: National Environmental Management: Waste Act, 2008 (Act No. 59 of 2008) — South Africa
Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) Regulations (effective from 2021) — covering electrical and electronic equipment and lighting; DFFE / Producer Responsibility Organisations

summary.en: China's end-of-life electronics framework includes the Regulation on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (WEEE-style, State Council Order No. 551) and a producer fund (treatment fund) financing recycling for catalogue products. China also runs producer-responsibility and recycling policies for designated electrical products. While conceptually related (both place end-of-life obligations on producers), the Chinese fund/catalogue system is administered separately and Chinese registration/fund payment does not satisfy South African EPR obligations.
summary.zh: 中国的报废电子框架包括《废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例》（WEEE 式，国务院令第 551 号）及为目录产品的回收提供资金的生产者基金（处理基金）。中国还对指定电器产品实施生产者责任和回收政策。虽然概念相关（两者均对生产者施加报废义务），但中国的基金/目录体系单独管理，中国的登记/基金缴纳不满足南非 EPR 义务。
summary.zht: 中國的報廢電子框架包括《廢棄電器電子產品回收處理管理條例》（WEEE 式，國務院令第 551 號）及為目錄產品的回收提供資金的生產者基金（處理基金）。中國還對指定電器產品實施生產者責任和回收政策。雖然概念相關（兩者均對生產者施加報廢義務），但中國的基金/目錄體系單獨管理，中國的登記/基金繳納不滿足南非 EPR 義務。

standards_or_laws: Regulation on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (State Council Order No. 551) — China WEEE-style framework
WEEE treatment fund / producer-responsibility policies for catalogue electrical products (China)

gap.en: South African EPR is a mandatory producer/importer obligation distinct from China's WEEE fund, with no mutual recognition. A Chinese LED exporter (or, more typically, its South Africa-based importer) entering the market must: (1) determine whether the product falls under the EPR-listed electrical/electronic and lighting categories; (2) register the producer/importer with the DFFE; (3) join or establish a Producer Responsibility Organisation (PRO) and pay EPR fees; (4) meet take-back/recycling and reporting obligations, including for packaging. Chinese WEEE-fund participation does not transfer. This is an ongoing operational/financial obligation rather than a one-time product test, and it is commonly handled by the local importer who places the goods on the market. Verify the current EPR scope, registered PROs, and fee schedules.
gap.zh: 南非 EPR 是不同于中国 WEEE 基金的强制生产者/进口商义务，无互认。进入市场的中国 LED 出口商（或更常见的其南非本地进口商）须：（1）判定产品是否落入 EPR 所列电气电子和照明类别；（2）向 DFFE 登记生产者/进口商；（3）加入或设立生产者责任组织（PRO）并缴纳 EPR 费用；（4）履行回收/再生及报告义务，包括包装。中国 WEEE 基金参与不可转移。这是持续性的运营/财务义务而非一次性产品检测，通常由投放货物的本地进口商处理。请核查现行 EPR 范围、已登记的 PRO 及费用表。
gap.zht: 南非 EPR 是不同於中國 WEEE 基金的強制生產者/進口商義務，無互認。進入市場的中國 LED 出口商（或更常見的其南非本地進口商）須：（1）判定產品是否落入 EPR 所列電氣電子和照明類別；（2）向 DFFE 登記生產者/進口商；（3）加入或設立生產者責任組織（PRO）並繳納 EPR 費用；（4）履行回收/再生及報告義務，包括包裝。中國 WEEE 基金參與不可轉移。這是持續性的運營/財務義務而非一次性產品檢測，通常由投放貨物的本地進口商處理。請核查現行 EPR 範圍、已登記的 PRO 及費用表。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (where in scope) — EPR registration with the DFFE, PRO membership and EPR fees required for producers/importers of in-scope electrical/electronic and lighting products under the Waste Act EPR Regulations; typically carried by the South Africa-based importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (catalogue/fund) — China WEEE-style recovery framework and treatment fund apply to catalogue products; does not satisfy South African EPR

source.publisher: Department of Forestry, Fisheries and the Environment (DFFE), South Africa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Although South Africa has no RoHS-style substance restriction, it does impose Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) for in-scope electrical/electronic and lighting products under the Waste Act EPR Regulations: producers/importers must register with the DFFE, join a PRO, pay EPR fees, and meet take-back/recycling obligations. China's WEEE fund participation does not transfer. This obligation is typically carried by the South Africa-based importer — confirm current EPR scope, PROs and fees.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 虽然南非无 RoHS 式物质限制，但依据《废弃物法》EPR 法规，对适用范围内的电气电子和照明产品施加生产者延伸责任（EPR）：生产者/进口商须向 DFFE 登记、加入 PRO、缴纳 EPR 费用，并履行回收/再生义务。中国 WEEE 基金参与不可转移。该义务通常由南非本地进口商承担——请确认现行 EPR 范围、PRO 及费用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 雖然南非無 RoHS 式物質限制，但依據《廢棄物法》EPR 法規，對適用範圍內的電氣電子和照明產品施加生產者延伸責任（EPR）：生產者/進口商須向 DFFE 登記、加入 PRO、繳納 EPR 費用，並履行回收/再生義務。中國 WEEE 基金參與不可轉移。該義務通常由南非本地進口商承擔——請確認現行 EPR 範圍、PRO 及費用。

requirement_topic.en: Overall Market-Access Process and Documentation vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: 整体市场准入流程与文件 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: 整體市場准入流程與文件 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: The South African market-access route for LED luminaires and lamps centres on the NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA), supported by a documentation set: (1) a test report demonstrating conformity to the SANS/IEC standards referenced by the applicable Compulsory Specification (e.g., SANS IEC 60598, SANS IEC 62560, SANS IEC 62471, SANS CISPR 15), typically from a SANAS-accredited or NRCS-accepted laboratory; (2) the SANS 941 energy-efficiency label registration where in scope; (3) ICASA type approval for wireless models; (4) EPR registration carried by the importer under the Waste Act; (5) a South Africa-based importer/legal entity to hold the LOA and EPR registration. There is no horizontal RoHS test requirement. The LOA is product/model specific and subject to NRCS market surveillance. Verify the exact Compulsory Specification, referenced SANS editions, and documentation list in force.
summary.zh: 南非 LED 灯具和灯的市场准入路径以 NRCS 授权函（LOA）为核心，并辅以一套文件：（1）证明符合适用强制性规范所引用 SANS/IEC 标准（如 SANS IEC 60598、SANS IEC 62560、SANS IEC 62471、SANS CISPR 15）的检测报告，通常来自 SANAS 认可或 NRCS 接受的实验室；（2）适用范围内的 SANS 941 能效标签注册；（3）无线机型的 ICASA 型号核准；（4）依《废弃物法》由进口商承担的 EPR 登记；（5）持有 LOA 和 EPR 登记的南非本地进口商/法人实体。不存在横向 RoHS 检测要求。LOA 针对特定产品/型号并受 NRCS 市场监督。请核查现行确切强制性规范、所引用 SANS 版本及文件清单。
summary.zht: 南非 LED 燈具和燈的市場准入路徑以 NRCS 授權函（LOA）為核心，並輔以一套文件：（1）證明符合適用強制性規範所引用 SANS/IEC 標準（如 SANS IEC 60598、SANS IEC 62560、SANS IEC 62471、SANS CISPR 15）的檢測報告，通常來自 SANAS 認可或 NRCS 接受的實驗室；（2）適用範圍內的 SANS 941 能效標籤注冊；（3）無線機型的 ICASA 型號核准；（4）依《廢棄物法》由進口商承擔的 EPR 登記；（5）持有 LOA 和 EPR 登記的南非本地進口商/法人實體。不存在橫向 RoHS 檢測要求。LOA 針對特定產品/型號並受 NRCS 市場監督。請核查現行確切強制性規範、所引用 SANS 版本及文件清單。

standards_or_laws: NRCS Act, 2008 (Act No. 5 of 2008) — Letter of Authority (LOA) regime and Compulsory Specifications
SANS IEC 60598 / SANS IEC 62560 / SANS IEC 62471 / SANS CISPR 15 / SANS 941 — referenced conformity standards
ICASA type approval (wireless) and Waste Act EPR Regulations (importer obligations)

summary.en: In China, the equivalent overall process is CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for in-scope luminaires, administered by CNCA and certified through CQC, with mandatory third-party testing to GB standards and factory inspection. Wireless models additionally require SRRC type approval, and energy-labelled products require China Energy Label (CEL) registration. Documentation centres on the CCC certificate, GB test reports, and the CEL registration. CCC certificates, GB reports, SRRC approval and CEL registration are China-specific and are not recognised for South African market access.
summary.zh: 在中国，等效的整体流程是适用范围内灯具的 CCC（中国强制性产品认证），由 CNCA 管理并通过 CQC 认证，须按 GB 标准进行强制第三方检测及工厂检查。无线机型还须 SRRC 型号核准，带能效标签产品须中国能效标识（CEL）注册。文件以 CCC 证书、GB 检测报告和 CEL 注册为核心。CCC 证书、GB 报告、SRRC 核准和 CEL 注册均为中国特有，不被南非市场准入认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，等效的整體流程是適用範圍內燈具的 CCC（中國強制性產品認證），由 CNCA 管理並通過 CQC 認證，須按 GB 標準進行強制第三方檢測及工廠檢查。無線機型還須 SRRC 型號核准，帶能效標籤產品須中國能效標識（CEL）注冊。文件以 CCC 證書、GB 檢測報告和 CEL 注冊為核心。CCC 證書、GB 報告、SRRC 核准和 CEL 注冊均為中國特有，不被南非市場准入認可。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — CNCA/CQC, GB standards, factory inspection
SRRC type approval (wireless) and China Energy Label (CEL) registration

gap.en: CCC and the NRCS LOA are parallel, non-mutually-recognised regimes. Key gaps for a Chinese exporter targeting South Africa: (1) conformity must be shown to SANS/IEC editions in force (not GB), via a test report acceptable to the NRCS; (2) the LOA must be held by a South Africa-based importer/legal entity — the manufacturer cannot self-hold it the way it relies on its own CCC certificate; (3) SANS 941 energy labelling must be applied in the South African format; (4) ICASA type approval (not SRRC) is required for wireless models; (5) EPR registration with the DFFE applies to the importer. Notably, there is no horizontal RoHS testing step in South Africa, so on substance restriction the South African burden is lighter than the EU's. The net effect: the exporter re-tests to SANS/IEC, engages a local importer, and completes the LOA + SANS 941 + (if wireless) ICASA + EPR steps. Verify the current Compulsory Specification and documentation list.
gap.zh: CCC 与 NRCS LOA 是并行的、不互认的制度。面向南非的中国出口商的主要差距：（1）须按现行 SANS/IEC 版本（而非 GB）证明符合性，并通过 NRCS 可接受的检测报告；（2）LOA 须由南非本地进口商/法人实体持有——制造商不能像依赖自身 CCC 证书那样自行持有；（3）SANS 941 能效标签须按南非格式应用；（4）无线机型须 ICASA 型号核准（而非 SRRC）；（5）EPR 登记由进口商向 DFFE 办理。值得注意的是，南非没有横向 RoHS 检测步骤，因此在物质限制方面南非的负担低于欧盟。净效应：出口商按 SANS/IEC 重新检测、委托本地进口商，并完成 LOA + SANS 941 +（若无线）ICASA + EPR 步骤。请核查现行强制性规范和文件清单。
gap.zht: CCC 與 NRCS LOA 是並行的、不互認的制度。面向南非的中國出口商的主要差距：（1）須按現行 SANS/IEC 版本（而非 GB）證明符合性，並通過 NRCS 可接受的檢測報告；（2）LOA 須由南非本地進口商/法人實體持有——製造商不能像依賴自身 CCC 證書那樣自行持有；（3）SANS 941 能效標籤須按南非格式應用；（4）無線機型須 ICASA 型號核准（而非 SRRC）；（5）EPR 登記由進口商向 DFFE 辦理。值得注意的是，南非沒有橫向 RoHS 檢測步驟，因此在物質限制方面南非的負擔低於歐盟。淨效應：出口商按 SANS/IEC 重新檢測、委託本地進口商，並完成 LOA + SANS 941 +（若無線）ICASA + EPR 步驟。請核查現行強制性規範和文件清單。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NRCS LOA (with SANS/IEC test reports), SANS 941 energy label (where in scope), ICASA type approval (wireless), and importer EPR registration are required for South African market access; no horizontal RoHS test step
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (GB standards, factory inspection) plus SRRC (wireless) and CEL registration; not recognised for South African market access

source.publisher: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (NRCS), South Africa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] South African market access for LED luminaires centres on the NRCS LOA (SANS/IEC test reports), with SANS 941 energy labelling, ICASA type approval for wireless models, and importer EPR registration — held/handled via a South Africa-based importer. CCC, GB reports, SRRC and CEL do not transfer. Unlike the EU, there is no horizontal RoHS substance-testing step. Re-test to the SANS/IEC editions in force and verify the current Compulsory Specification and documentation list before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] LED 灯具进入南非以 NRCS LOA（SANS/IEC 检测报告）为核心，并须 SANS 941 能效标签、无线机型的 ICASA 型号核准及进口商 EPR 登记——通过南非本地进口商持有/办理。CCC、GB 报告、SRRC 和 CEL 不可转移。与欧盟不同，无横向 RoHS 物质检测步骤。出货前请按现行 SANS/IEC 版本重新检测，并核查现行强制性规范和文件清单。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] LED 燈具進入南非以 NRCS LOA（SANS/IEC 檢測報告）為核心，並須 SANS 941 能效標籤、無線機型的 ICASA 型號核准及進口商 EPR 登記——通過南非本地進口商持有/辦理。CCC、GB 報告、SRRC 和 CEL 不可轉移。與歐盟不同，無橫向 RoHS 物質檢測步驟。出貨前請按現行 SANS/IEC 版本重新檢測，並核查現行強制性規範和文件清單。
